title: Multiple Accreditations of Principal/Employer. A principal may be
content: 53 accredited to a maximum of three (3) LMAs, provided that a uniform wage and 54 compensation package shall be adopted by the principal for all seafarers similarly 55 situated. 56 57 The wage and compensation may vary if the ship for enrollment by the principal is owned 58 by a different entity, the ship is covered by a different CBA, or in any other situations as 59 may be allowed by the Department. 60 61 34

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
